zh.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle是Sir Robert de Cralle和Marie de Pepelsham的女兒，於1366年出生在英國英格蘭素可。她於1397年與Vincent Finch IV在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1457年11月20日在英國素可勞頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle是Sir Robert de Cralle和Marie de Pepelsham的女儿，于1366年出生在英国英格兰素可。她于1397年与Vincent Finch IV在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1457年11月20日在英国素可勞頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cralle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of German Kralle (see Krall ).

variants.name: Crawley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Crawley, for example in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Sussex, and Oxfordshire, named with Old English crāwe ‘crow’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Crowley .

Irish (Louth): in Ireland, this is generally the English name in 1 above, but it may also have been adopted for McCrawley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghallaigh ‘son of Raghallach’, also Anglicized as Magreely.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle was born in 1366, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Robert de Cralle and Marie de Pepelsham. She married Vincent Finch IV in 1397, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 November 1457, in Laughton, Sussex, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle est née en 1366, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Robert de Cralle et Marie de Pepelsham. Elle a épousé Vincent Finch IV en 1397, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1457, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle wurde 1366 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Robert de Cralle und Marie de Pepelsham geboren. Sie hat 1397 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Vincent Finch IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. November 1457 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Laughton, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle è nata il nel 1366 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Robert de Cralle e Marie de Pepelsham. Lei sposato Vincent Finch IV nel 1397, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1457, nel Laughton, Sussex, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralleは1366年にイギリスイギリススセックスでSir Robert de CralleとMarie de Pepelshamの娘として生まれた。1397年にイギリスイギリススセックスでVincent Finch IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1457年11月20日にイギリススセックスラウトンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle(은)는 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Sir Robert de Cralle(와)과 Marie de Pepelsham의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Vincent Finch IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 11월 20일 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle nasceu em 1366, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Robert de Cralle e Marie de Pepelsham. Ela casou-se com Vincent Finch IV em 1397, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1457, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle родилась в 1366 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Robert de Cralle и Marie de Pepelsham. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vincent Finch IV в 1397 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 ноября 1457 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella de Cralle nació en 1366, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Robert de Cralle y Marie de Pepelsham. Se casó con Vincent Finch IV en 1397, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1457, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
